stemHtml: What is the best way in dealing with thunderstorms associated with a cold front?

options.a: Flying through the front with maximum speed and perpendicular to the front line in order to minimize the time of hazard exposure.
options.b: Flying underneath the cloud base in all cases.
options.c: Avoidance of embedded CBs by using airborne weather radar.
options.d: Flying through the upper third of the clouds to prevent the aircraft from being struck by lightning.
